description_long: This object is a stylized red flower with a closed or partially opened bud, featuring a smooth, slightly faceted surface texture. The flower's petals are tightly wrapped, forming an elongated, tulip-like shape with subtle vertical ridges. The stem is slender, green, and straight, supporting the bud at the top and extending downward. Two green leaves, one larger and one smaller, emerge from the lower part of the stem, both with a simple, lanceolate shape. The base of the bud is encased in a green calyx, which transitions smoothly into the stem. The overall appearance is clean and geometric, with a focus on simple, bold forms and clear color separation between the red petals and green stem and leaves.
description: A stylized red flower bud with a green stem and two lanceolate leaves, featuring a smooth, geometric appearance. The petals are tightly wrapped, forming a tulip-like shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red bud, green calyx, and two visible green leaves on the stem.
description_view_1: Side view with the red bud and calyx visible, and only one leaf clearly seen on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the red bud, calyx, and the two leaves visible, but the leaves appear more separated.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the red bud and calyx, and only one leaf visible on the right side.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a tight, overlapping whorl, forming a closed bud with radial symmetry and no visible separation between individual petals.
